channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti spray paint along albert emabankment wall where path is, 19th April
item.description:
Graffiti on wall of Albert Embankment almost opposite The Rose Pub on river path
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 93, Albert Embankment, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shoulder of Mutton Green, Welling, 19th April
item.description:
Items of clothing thrown into various trees x 6 on pathway on the green

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Close, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned barrier, 19th April
item.description:
These barriers are here for monts now. Abstructed the traffic . Looks awful and i do not want to see daily from my kitchen. Cars can not pass each other because of this barriers. Limiting the space

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): George Row, Bermondsey, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on pavement, 19th April
item.description:
Mattress dumped and blocking pavement outside 217 Colyers Lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colyers Lane, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Just outside 2 bromley crescent., 19th April
item.description:
It has been there for many months, just decided to report it now. There is also one further along in the middle of the road. So sorry but didn’t take a photo of it. Thank you for your kind attention.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen Anne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped bin, 19th April
item.description:
Please collect a bin that has been dumped on Linnell Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Shenley Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Lamplight between 52-53 Thamesbank Place, 19th April
item.description:
The lamplight cover is broken and hanging down, since weekend

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thamesbank Place, Greater London

item.title: Bellegrove road oppisite The westwood center, 19th April

Chair dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead ginger cat, 19th April
item.description:
Dead ginger in the road left lane Ilderton Road junction Ablett Street SE16 3BL, in a position where it would continue to be run over and drivers were swerving to avoid the dead cat. Viewed at 5:15 am - 19/04/2026 by a Lewisham resident. Caller ask if a note can be put up to alert the owner.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ablett Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing rubbish, 19th April
item.description:
Rubbish overflowing but also has blown down alleyway and mound next to bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti spray painted onto timber fence, 19th April
item.description:
Recent graffiti has been spray painted on to timber fence

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aubert Park, Highbury, Greater London

item.title: Bellegrove Road by green, 19th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London

item.title: Herbert butler community centre bin, 19th April

Big wheelie bin tipped over excessive rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mabley Street, Hackney, London

item.title: Infront of last garage of leff house, 19th April
item.description:
Lime.bike parked in the road blocking exit of car in garage

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Avenue, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Quad and dirt bikes- ruining our green!!!, 19th April
item.description:
I am reporting ongoing issues with quad bikes and dirt bikes being ridden on the council-owned green on our road. This happened all last summer and has now started again this year. The bikes are damaging the grass and tearing up the land. The riders do not live on our road—they come from near Lessons Hill Primary School through the alleyway. The noise is very disruptive, especially on Saturdays and Sundays, often continuing all day and as late as 7:15pm on Sundays. The police have been made aware of this issue. This needs to be stopped. Please can you: Put up signs to prevent this Take action to stop bikes accessing the green Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Batchwood Green, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flag on a lamppost directly outside my house., 19th April
item.description:
This flag was put up a few months ago and I expected it to be removed by now. It is directly outside my bedroom window and when the weather is particularly bad, it can make a lot of noise which disturbs mine and my partners sleep. Furthermore, it is an eyesore, devaluing the property and does not represent my views.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Inglewood Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped items, 19th April
item.description:
Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lettsom Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 19th April
item.description:
Hhhh

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Neckinger, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All the lighting on the large parking lot are all out., 19th April
item.description:
The light bulbs at the car park in front of St Brelades Court N1 need to be replaced as the entire area is blacked out and could potentially lead to other forms of crime and car theft. The area hasn't been lit up for months getting to 1 year now.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: All out - three or more street lights in a row
